primary_operations.name: Call
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp, err := c.client.Call(context.Background(), connect.NewRequest(&Request{Payload: req})); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return resp.Msg.Payload, nil

code_style_notes: connect-go works over HTTP/1.1 + HTTP/2 — supports gRPC, gRPC-Web, Connect protocols simultaneously
Generated client expects http.Client + base URL
